title: Chain handoffs: swarming final-slice/small-lane -> scribing; compounding close records review candidate + truthful unreviewed
action: Re-wire the post-execution chain so features close WITHOUT automatic review (SPEC R3, flow 7.1, per 565e68d0). bee-swarming/SKILL.md: (a) Completion Signals — 'the final slice is executed' now tells the user 'Swarm execution complete for the final slice. Invoke bee-scribing.' and adds one line: implementation is verified; independent review runs only on user request (R1); (b) the standalone closing line near the end of the file changes identically; (c) Solo execution (tiny/small): small's handoff no longer invokes bee-reviewing with one correctness reviewer — both tiny and small present the done-report (diff + fresh verify output + capture line) and invoke bee-scribing; note that the 1-correctness-reviewer contract now lives inside a user-invoked review session for small scopes (SPEC goal 1: zero reviewer tokens without an explicit request); tiny's self-review stays — it is verification, not independent review (R2). (d) There are exactly FOUR 'bee-reviewing' occurrences in the file today (lines ~22, ~45, ~69, ~100): (a)-(c) cover 22/69/100; line ~45 — the frozen-judge escalation 'flag it for bee-reviewing' inside the Operating Contract — is REWORDED (this one exception to the untouched-protocol rule is explicitly granted) to 'record the hits in the cell trace and carry them into any review session that later covers this scope' — the escalation strength is preserved, only the auto-review destination changes. Every other worker-protocol section stays untouched. Keep the small-lane wording aligned with the lanes table cell review-od-6 writes in bee-hive ('no auto reviewer; the 1-correctness contract lives inside a user-invoked session' — same fact, two files, one wave). bee-scribing/SKILL.md: update only chain-position wording — scribing follows execution directly (no review stage between); a feature may be scribed and closed while unreviewed; do not alter any capture/spec-sync rule. bee-compounding/SKILL.md: at feature close add the review-candidate step — run node .bee/bin/bee_reviews.mjs candidate add --feature <feature> --head "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" --mode <lane> (mode = the feature's lane; head = HEAD at close per plan open-question 2), then post the SPEC §9 completion line ('Completed and verified: N cells. Independent review not requested; the change set was added to review candidates.'); feature closes with truthful unreviewed status — closing prose must never describe unreviewed work as review-approved (R10, 7.4 step 5). Keep each file's unchanged sections byte-stable; house style and heading structure preserved.

truths: no completion signal in bee-swarming names bee-reviewing; final-slice and small-lane handoffs go to bee-scribing
small lane spawns zero reviewers at close; the correctness-reviewer contract is documented as living inside a user-invoked session
bee-compounding's close step runs bee_reviews.mjs candidate add with feature, head, and mode, then posts the §9 completion line
closing prose labels the feature unreviewed truthfully; nothing describes completion as review approval

artifacts.substantive: final-slice + small-lane handoff to scribing, R1 no-auto-review note; worker protocol untouched
candidate add close step + §9 completion line + truthful unreviewed close

key_links: candidate add flags match bee_reviews.mjs shipped in slice 1 (--feature/--head/--mode; --mode required)
SPEC 7.1 step 6 and §9 are the wording sources for the completion line
prohibitions: Do not touch bee-reviewing, bee-hive, AGENTS files, or docs/ (cells 4 and 6)
Do not alter tiny's self-review/done-report discipline or any verification/cap rule (R2)
Do not alter scribing capture/spec-sync rules — chain-position wording only

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && ! grep -F "bee-reviewing" skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md && grep -qF "candidate add" skills/bee-compounding/SKILL.md

trace.outcome: Re-wired swarming/scribing/compounding chain handoffs off automatic review per R3/7.1/565e68d0: bee-swarming final-slice and small-lane completion signals now point to bee-scribing (all 4 bee-reviewing occurrences removed — 2 completion signals reworded, small-lane handoff merged with tiny's done-report pattern, frozen-judge escalation reworded to carry hits into any later review session); bee-scribing sync trigger + description updated to 'execution completes' (chain-position wording only, no capture/spec-sync rule change); bee-compounding gained a Review candidate at close step running bee_reviews.mjs candidate add --feature/--head/--mode plus the SPEC §9 completion line, with explicit truthful-unreviewed framing.
